ddls:
CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "country" TEXT /* The country where the region is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "applications" (
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each application record */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region */,
  "oxford_applications" INTEGER /* Number of applications to Oxford */,
  "cambridge_applications" INTEGER /* Number of applications to Cambridge */,
  "year" INTEGER /* The year the applications were made */,
  "gender_distribution" TEXT /* Distribution of applications by gender */,
  "age_range" TEXT /* Age range of the applicants */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("application_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_applications_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "offers" (
  "offer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each offer record */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region */,
  "oxford_offers" INTEGER /* Number of offers made by Oxford */,
  "cambridge_offers" INTEGER /* Number of offers made by Cambridge */,
  "year" INTEGER /* The year the offers were made */,
  "gender_distribution" TEXT /* Distribution of offers by gender */,
  "age_range" TEXT /* Age range of the students who received offers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("offer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_offers_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "admissions" (
  "admission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each admission record */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region */,
  "oxford_admitted" INTEGER /* Number of admissions to Oxford */,
  "cambridge_admitted" INTEGER /* Number of admissions to Cambridge */,
  "year" INTEGER /* The year the admissions were recorded */,
  "gender_distribution" TEXT /* Distribution of admissions by gender */,
  "age_range" TEXT /* Age range of the admitted students */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("admission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_admissions_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_profiles" (
  "profile_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student profile */,
  "student_name" TEXT /* Name of the student */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the application record */,
  "offer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the offer record */,
  "admission_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the admission record */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the student */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the student */,
  "gpa" REAL /* Grade Point Average of the student */,
  "extracurricular_activities" TEXT /* Extracurricular activities the student is involved in */,
  "application_year" INTEGER /* The year the student applied to the universities */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("profile_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_profiles_application_id FOREIGN KEY ("application_id") REFERENCES applications ("application_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_profiles_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_profiles_offer_id FOREIGN KEY ("offer_id") REFERENCES offers ("offer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_profiles_admission_id FOREIGN KEY ("admission_id") REFERENCES admissions ("admission_id")
)
column_names: The country where the region is located
Unique identifier for each application record
The year the applications were made
Unique identifier for each offer record
Number of offers made by Oxford
Number of offers made by Cambridge
The year the offers were made
Age range of the students who received offers
Unique identifier for each admission record
The year the admissions were recorded
Age range of the admitted students
Unique identifier for each student profile
Grade Point Average of the student
Extracurricular activities the student is involved in
The year the student applied to the universities
